title: VAT Onboarding Module
text:
## Learning Goal
This onboarding module introduces the basic structure of VAT support questions and referral boundaries.

## Recognizing Common Questions
Common first-line questions involve VAT rates, registration timing, filing frequency, and invoice requirements.

## What Helpdesk Can Say
Helpdesk may provide public guidance, procedural steps, and links to official sources when the answer is clearly documented.

## When To Escalate
Escalate when the case turns on factual disputes, anti-abuse concerns, or interpretation of multiple legal sources.
